summary: Two service-layer ES modules wired into the fixed update order and the event bus. AudioSystem builds a Web Audio graph (master->limiter->buses) and renders all SFX/music procedurally from oscillators, noise buffers, ADSR envelopes and biquad filters; it listens to gameplay events, plays positional one-shots with distance attenuation relative to the player ship, and runs a 4-layer adaptive music bed (calm/tense/combat/docked) crossfaded from a derived threat level. SaveSystem owns serialization: it walks a fixed registry of systems that each expose serialize()/deserialize(data), assembles a versioned save envelope, writes autosave + manual slots to localStorage and to an exportable/importable JSON file, runs ordered migrations on load, and provides new-game initialization. Both compose only through GameState + emit/on; neither hardcodes content (synth recipes and slot config are data).
mechanics: AUDIO GRAPH: one AudioContext (created lazily on first user gesture to satisfy autoplay policy; ctx.resume() on click). Graph: per-voice source -> voiceGain(ADSR) -> [optional biquad] -> busInput. Buses: sfxBus(GainNode) and musicBus(GainNode) both -> masterGain(GainNode) -> masterLimiter(DynamicsCompressorNode thr -6dB, knee 6, ratio 12, atk 0.003, rel 0.25) -> ctx.destination.

GAIN MODEL: settings volumes 0..1 are perceptual; convert to linear amplitude g = v^2 (equal-ish loudness). masterGain.gain = master^2, sfxBus.gain = sfx^2, musicBus.gain = music^2. Mute = ramp target to 0 over 0.05s.
VOICE POOL: cap 24 concurrent SFX voices. If at cap, steal the oldest non-loop voice. Each one-shot fully disconnects on envelope end (scheduled stop) to free nodes; never leak OscillatorNodes.

ENVELOPE: helper env(param, t0, peak, {a,d,s,r,sus}) = setValueAtTime(0,t0); linearRampToValueAtTime(peak,t0+a); linearRampToValueAtTime(peak*sus,t0+a+d); (hold at sustain); at release time t1: setValueAtTime(current,t1); exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t1+r). Use exponential for natural tails, linear for attack.

NOISE: pre-generate one 2s white-noise AudioBuffer at ctx.sampleRate, reused via BufferSource (loop for sustained, one-shot for transients). Pink-ish noise = white through lowpass 1200Hz when a softer bed is wanted.

ONE-SHOT API: Audio.play(recipeId, {position?:{x,z}, gain?:1, detune?:0, rate?:1}). Recipes are data (see content). Each recipe = array of layers; layer = {type:'osc'|'noise', wave, freq, freqEnd?, glideT?, filter?, amp, env}.

POSITIONAL ATTENUATION (no full HRTF; cheap 2D): for a SFX at world (x,z), d = dist(pos, playerPos). attGain = clamp(1 - (d - dNear)/(dFar - dNear), 0, 1)^2 with dNear=40wu, dFar=900wu. If d>dFar, skip the voice entirely (cull). Stereo pan via a StereoPannerNode: pan = clamp((x - playerX)/panSpan, -1, 1) with panSpan=600wu, rotated into camera space using camera yaw so left/right matches screen. Pitch doppler optional: rate *= clamp(1 - radialVel/8000, 0.9, 1.1).

MINING-BEAM LOOP: a sustained voice started on 'mining:start' and released on 'mining:stop'. Held sawtooth 70Hz through lowpass(sweeping 400->900Hz LFO 6Hz) + amplitude tremolo LFO 11Hz depth 0.25; gain 0.18. Tracks the targeted asteroid position each frame for attenuation.

ALARMS: 'lowShield' alarm = repeating two-tone beep (880/660Hz square, 0.12s each, gap 0.18s) at gain 0.12, started when shieldPct<0.25, stopped when >=0.25 or destroyed. 'lowHull' alarm = slower 440Hz sine pulse 0.25s on / 0.4s off gain 0.16 when hullPct<0.20. Implemented as a setInterval-free scheduler that re-arms via ctx.currentTime lookahead (25ms tick, 0.1s schedule horizon).

MUSIC BED: 4 stem layers, each a looping generative pad/arp built from oscillators (NOT samples). Layer A drone (calm), B harmonic pad (tense), C percussion+bass pulse (combat), D warm filtered chord (docked). All share a tempo grid (96 BPM, beat=0.625s). Mix = target weights per state; each stem gain crossfades to its target over xfadeT=2.5s (combat enter faster: 1.0s). Stems run continuously at low CPU; only gains change.

MUSIC STATE MACHINE: state in {calm,tense,combat,docked}. docked forced when GameState.player.docked. Else combat if threat>=0.6, tense if threat>=0.2, else calm. threat = clamp( 0.5*nearbyHostiles/3 + 0.5*(1 - shieldPct) * inCombatRecent , 0,1) where inCombatRecent=1 if last damage taken/dealt < 6s ago. Hysteresis: must hold a new state 1.5s before switching to avoid flapping.
STEM WEIGHTS (gain targets per state) calm:[A1,B0,C0,D0] tense:[A0.7,B0.8,C0,D0] combat:[A0.4,B0.5,C1,D0] docked:[A0.2,B0.2,C0,D0.9]. Master musicBus unaffected; only stem gains move.
DUCKING: on large explosion / jump, duck musicBus by *0.5 over 0.08s, recover over 0.8s (sidechain feel without a compressor sidechain).

SAVE ENVELOPE: { fmt:'spaceface-save', version:N, savedAt:isoString, playtimeS:Number, slot:String, checksum:String, data:{ <systemKey>: <systemState> } }. checksum = FNV-1a hex of JSON.stringify(data) for corruption detection (not security).

SERIALIZATION REGISTRY: SaveSystem holds SYSTEM_ORDER = ['meta','player','fleet','inventory','economy','factions','missions','tech','map','world','settings']. On save it calls ctx.systems[k].serialize() for each present key; on load it calls deserialize(data[k]) in the SAME order so dependencies restore correctly (player before fleet fittings, economy before missions).

SERIALIZE CONTRACT: every saveable system implements serialize():PlainJSON (no class instances, no Three.js objects, no functions, no Infinity/NaN; numbers rounded to <=4 dp for drift fields) and deserialize(data):void that rebuilds runtime state and re-emits any needed 'restored' events. Missing key on load => system uses its newGame() defaults. Unknown extra keys are preserved but ignored (forward-compat).

AUTOSAVE: timer every 120s of unpaused play AND on key events ('player:docked','sector:changed','mission:completed') debounced to max 1 write / 10s. Writes to slot 'auto'. Never autosaves while player.dead or during a 'jump' transition.
MANUAL SAVES: 5 named slots 'slot0'..'slot4' + 'auto' + 'quick'. localStorage keys 'sf.save.<slot>'. Quicksave key F5, quickload F9 (settings-rebindable).

FILE EXPORT/IMPORT: export = Blob([JSON.stringify(envelope)], 'application/json') -> download 'spaceface_<slot>_<date>.json'. import = FileReader -> JSON.parse -> validate fmt+version -> migrate -> load. Reject if fmt!=='spaceface-save'.

MIGRATION: MIGRATIONS = ordered array of {from:N, to:N, fn(data)}. loadEnvelope runs fn for each step from save.version up to CURRENT_VERSION, mutating data; if version>CURRENT_VERSION refuse (newer game). If a migration throws, abort load and surface error event, do not corrupt current state.

LOAD SEQUENCE: pause sim -> validate -> migrate -> clear transient runtime (despawn entities) -> deserialize in SYSTEM_ORDER -> emit 'save:loaded' -> rebuild scene from restored GameState -> unpause. Atomic: build a candidate state object; only swap into live GameState if all deserializers succeed.

CORRUPTION HANDLING: on parse/checksum failure, do not overwrite; emit 'save:error' with reason. localStorage write wrapped in try/catch for QuotaExceeded -> emit 'save:error' quota, suggest export-to-file.

NEW GAME: SaveSystem.newGame(seed) calls each system's newGame() to populate GameState from data defaults, sets meta.version=CURRENT_VERSION, meta.seed=seed||Date.now(), playtimeS=0, then emits 'game:started'.
PLAYTIME: meta.playtimeS accumulates fixed-dt only while not paused; serialized as integer seconds.
stateOwned: GameState.meta.version: int — save schema version the running state conforms to (== CURRENT_VERSION after load/migrate)
GameState.meta.seed: int — world RNG seed, set at new-game, never changes
GameState.meta.playtimeS: int — total active play seconds, autosave-accumulated
GameState.settings.gfx.parallaxLayers/shadows/etc: passthrough owned by render but serialized under settings

GameState.audioRuntime (NON-serialized, transient): { ctx, masterGain, sfxBus, musicBus, limiter, voices:[], stems:{A,B,C,D}, musicState, threat, alarms:{lowShield,lowHull} } — rebuilt each session, never saved
GameState.save (NON-serialized transient): { lastAutosaveAt, dirty:bool, currentSlot } — runtime save bookkeeping
SaveSystem does NOT own gameplay data; it orchestrates other systems' serialize/deserialize. Audio settings live under settings (owned here for the volume sliders).
content: RECIPE pulse_laser | osc square 1200Hz->600Hz glide 0.06s | bandpass 1500Hz Q4 | amp 0.22 | env a0.002 d0.05 s0 r0.05 | dur ~0.11s
RECIPE beam_laser | osc saw 440Hz steady + osc sine 442Hz (beat) | lowpass 2500Hz | amp 0.18 | env a0.04 sustain-while-firing r0.12 (loop voice, released on fire-stop)
RECIPE autocannon | noise burst + osc square 180Hz->90Hz 0.03s | highpass 300Hz then lowpass 3500Hz | amp 0.25 | env a0.001 d0.04 s0 r0.03 | dur 0.06s, fired per round
RECIPE missile_launch | noise (whoosh) lowpass sweep 300->2000Hz over 0.4s + osc sine 120Hz thump | amp 0.3 | env a0.01 d0.3 s0.2 r0.25 | dur ~0.6s
RECIPE explosion_small | noise through lowpass sweep 1800->120Hz over 0.4s + osc sine 90Hz->40Hz | amp 0.5 | env a0.002 d0.35 s0 r0.2 | dur ~0.55s
RECIPE explosion_large | layered: noise lowpass 2200->60Hz over 0.9s + sine 70->30Hz sub + crackle (noise bursts) | amp 0.8 | env a0.003 d0.8 s0 r0.5 | triggers music duck | dur ~1.4s
RECIPE mining_beam_loop | saw 70Hz, lowpass LFO 6Hz 400-900Hz, tremolo LFO 11Hz depth0.25 | amp 0.18 | loop voice start/stop
RECIPE shield_hit | osc sine 600Hz + ring-mod 90Hz, fast bandpass 800Hz Q8 | amp 0.3 | env a0.001 d0.12 s0 r0.08 | shimmer | dur 0.18s
RECIPE hull_hit | noise burst lowpass 900Hz + osc square 140Hz | amp 0.35 | env a0.001 d0.08 s0 r0.06 | dur 0.12s
RECIPE ui_click | osc sine 1000Hz | amp 0.12 | env a0.001 d0.03 s0 r0.02 | dur 0.05s
RECIPE ui_confirm | sine 800Hz->1200Hz glide 0.08s | amp 0.14 | env a0.002 d0.1 s0 r0.06 | dur 0.16s
RECIPE ui_deny | square 300Hz->200Hz glide 0.1s | amp 0.16 | env a0.002 d0.12 s0 r0.06 | dur 0.18s
RECIPE docking_clamp | noise thunk lowpass 500Hz + osc square 80Hz two hits 0.0s & 0.12s | amp 0.4 | env per-hit a0.001 d0.1 r0.08 | dur 0.3s
RECIPE jump_warp | osc saw 100Hz->1500Hz rising glide 1.2s + noise riser highpass sweep + final boom sine 60Hz | amp 0.5 | ducks music | dur ~1.5s
RECIPE item_pickup | sine 880Hz->1320Hz two-note arp 0.0/0.07s | amp 0.18 | env a0.001 d0.08 r0.05 | dur 0.18s
RECIPE credits_gained | triangle 660/990/1320Hz quick arp 0.0/0.05/0.10s | amp 0.16 | env a0.001 d0.06 r0.05 | dur 0.2s
RECIPE alarm_low_shield | square 880/660Hz alternating 0.12s, 0.18s gap | amp 0.12 | repeating until cleared
RECIPE alarm_low_hull | sine 440Hz pulse 0.25s on/0.4s off | amp 0.16 | repeating until cleared
MUSIC stem A (drone/calm) | 2 detuned saw osc 55Hz & 55.3Hz -> lowpass 600Hz + slow LFO; root note from scale | continuous loop
MUSIC stem B (pad/tense) | triad sine cluster (root, min3, 5th) 110-330Hz, lowpass 1400Hz, chorus via 3 detuned voices | continuous
MUSIC stem C (combat) | square bass arp 8th-notes at 96BPM + noise hat on offbeats + sub kick sine 50Hz on beats 1&3 | continuous, gated by gain
MUSIC stem D (docked) | warm triangle chord maj add9, lowpass 1100Hz, gentle 0.2Hz amplitude swell | continuous

SAVE SLOTS | localStorage keys: sf.save.auto, sf.save.quick, sf.save.slot0..slot4 | index key sf.save.index = [{slot,savedAt,playtimeS,credits,sectorName,shipName}] for menu listing without parsing full saves
CURRENT_VERSION = 3 (example) | MIGRATIONS: {1->2 add factions.rep defaults}, {2->3 rename economy.drift->economy.markets, add per-good lastTradeTick}

NEW-GAME DEFAULTS | credits 5000cr | ship 'shuttle_mk1' | cargo empty (cap 50u) | sector 'sol_gate' | faction rep all 0 (neutral, range -100..100) | tech none unlocked | map: only start sector + its station discovered | settings audio {0.8/0.9/0.6} | playtimeS 0
formulas: voiceFinalGain = recipe.amp * callGain * attGain   // capped: min(_,1.0) before reaching bus
attGain(d) = clamp(1 - (d - dNear)/(dFar - dNear), 0, 1)^2,  dNear=40, dFar=900 (wu)
stemGain_target = STEM_WEIGHTS[state][stem]; stemGain ->target over xfadeT (combat enter 1.0s else 2.5s)
envelope: peak at t0+a, decay to peak*sus at t0+a+d, release exp to 0.0001 over r
FNV-1a checksum: h=2166136261; for each char c: h=(h^c.charCodeAt())*16777619 >>>0; hex(h)
playtimeS += floor(accumulatedUnpausedDt) on each whole-second boundary
autosaveDue = (now - save.lastAutosaveAt) >= 120s OR (triggerEvent AND now - lastWrite >= 10s)
marketDriftSerialized: per good store {price:int, stock:int, lastTick:int} only for sectors visited (lazy); unvisited sectors regenerate from seed on demand
interactions: ON 'weapon:fired' {weaponType, position, ownerId} -> Audio.play(recipeForWeapon[weaponType], {position}); maps pulse->pulse_laser, beam->beam_laser(loop), auto->autocannon, missile->missile_launch
ON 'weapon:beamStop' {ownerId} -> release the beam_laser/mining loop voice for that owner
ON 'mining:start' {asteroidId, position} -> start mining_beam_loop voice tracking asteroid; ON 'mining:stop' -> release it
ON 'entity:destroyed' {size, position} -> Audio.play(size>=large?'explosion_large':'explosion_small', {position}); large also ducks music
ON 'player:lowShield'/'player:lowHull' (or AudioSystem derives from GameState.player.shieldPct/hullPct each tick) -> arm/clear alarm loops
ON 'player:docked' -> docking_clamp + force music 'docked'; ON 'player:undocked' -> recompute music state
ON 'jump:start' -> jump_warp sfx + duck; music handled by sector change
ON 'sector:changed' {sectorId} -> trigger autosave; let music recompute threat next tick
ON 'item:pickup' {kind} -> Audio.play('item_pickup'); ON 'credits:changed' {delta} with delta>0 -> Audio.play('credits_gained')
ON 'ui:click'/'ui:confirm'/'ui:deny' (emitted by DOM UI layer) -> corresponding UI sfx (no position, center pan)
ON 'settings:changed' {section:'audio'} -> AudioSystem re-reads settings, ramps bus gains over 0.05s
SAVE: emits 'save:started','save:completed' {slot}, 'save:error' {reason}, 'save:loaded' {slot}, 'game:started' — UI shows toast/notification on these

SAVE reads from EVERY saveable system via systems[k].serialize(); writes back via deserialize(); SaveSystem must be registered LAST in update order so all systems exist; but its serialize loop is called on-demand not per-tick

AudioSystem.update(dt) each tick: resume ctx if needed, recompute threat+music crossfades, update positional attenuation for active loop voices (mining/beam), tick alarm scheduler, accumulate nothing to GameState except reading player pos/shield/hull
AudioSystem exposes serialize()=NONE for runtime (only settings.audio persists, owned under settings system); restore = re-read settings on init
NOTIFICATION coupling: 'save:completed' -> NotificationSystem 'Game saved (slot X)'; 'save:error' -> red toast
uiNeeds: Settings panel: 3 volume sliders (master/sfx/music, 0-100%) bound to settings.audio.* emitting 'settings:changed', a Mute toggle, and a live 'test sfx' button per category

Save/Load menu: list of 7 slots (auto, quick, slot0-4) each showing from sf.save.index: timestamp, playtime (Hh Mm), credits, current sector name, ship name; Save / Load / Delete / Export buttons per slot
Import button: file picker accepting .json -> validate -> on success refresh slot list and offer Load
Export feedback: triggers browser download; toast 'Exported spaceface_slotX_date.json'
Toast/notification surface for 'save:completed' (green, 2s), 'save:error' (red, sticky until dismissed, includes reason + 'Export to file' fallback button on quota error)
Confirm dialog for overwriting an occupied slot and for loading (discards unsaved progress) — wired to ui:confirm/ui:deny sounds
Optional on-screen low-shield/low-hull alarm indicator that visually matches the audio alarm state (pulsing red border) — driven by same shieldPct/hullPct thresholds
New Game / Continue (loads 'auto' or last slot) buttons on main menu; Continue disabled if no saves found in sf.save.index
risks: AudioContext autoplay policy: ctx must be created/resumed on a user gesture (first click) or all audio is silent — gate AudioSystem init behind first input and queue any early events
Node leak / GC: every one-shot must disconnect after release+tail; failing to stop/disconnect OscillatorNodes degrades performance over a long session — enforce via voice pool with scheduled teardown
Voice storms: rapid autocannon/many enemies can exceed the 24-voice cap and clip the limiter — apply per-recipe min-retrigger interval (e.g. autocannon 60ms) and oldest-voice stealing
Music CPU: 4 continuously-running stems with LFOs are fine, but recreating oscillators on state change causes clicks — only change gains, never restart stems; crossfade with setTargetAtTime
Clicks/pops: always start envelopes from ~0 and release with exponentialRampToValueAtTime to 0.0001 (never to 0), and avoid abrupt gain.value assignments mid-sound

localStorage quota (~5MB): full save with per-sector market drift could grow — only persist VISITED sectors' drift, regenerate the rest from seed; keep the lightweight sf.save.index separate so the menu never parses big blobs

Migration correctness: each migration must be pure and idempotent enough to re-run safely; never load a save with version>CURRENT_VERSION; abort-on-throw must not partially mutate live GameState (build candidate, then swap)

Serialization purity: a stray Three.js Object3D, Map, Set, function, Infinity or NaN in a serialize() output breaks JSON or restore — each system's serialize() must return plain JSON; add a dev-mode assert that JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) round-trips
Determinism on load: systems must deserialize in SYSTEM_ORDER so cross-references (fleet fittings referencing player ship defs, missions referencing factions) resolve; document and enforce the order

Save/scene desync: after load, transient runtime (spawned entities, audio voices) must be fully cleared and rebuilt from GameState, or ghosts persist — explicit 'despawn all then rebuild' step in load sequence
